after.title: SLA breach route
after.status: SLA breach escalated with correct owners, customer-safe next step, and timer audit.
after.riskSummary: 5 signals: breach, route, enterprise account, open customer impact, audit required
after.customerMessage: Your enterprise SLA breach has been escalated to Support, Customer Success, Product, Operations. Next step: Support owner review by 16:00. We will keep you updated as each owner responds within the agreed support window.
